name: Maliss in Underground
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ∀ＬＩＣＥ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＩＮ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＵＮＤＥＲＧＲＯＵＮＤ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンダーグラウンド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can banish 1 "Maliss" card from your hand, Deck, or GY. While 3 or more of your "Maliss" Traps with different names are banished, "Maliss" Link Monsters you control gain 3000 ATK. While you control a "Maliss" Link Monster, your opponent's monsters can only target "Maliss" Link Monsters for attacks. You can only activate 1 "Maliss in Underground" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can banish 1 "Maliss" card from your hand, Deck, or GY. While 3 or more of your "Maliss" Traps with different names are banished, "Maliss" Link Monsters you control gain 3000 ATK. While you control a "Maliss" Link Monster, your opponent's monsters can only target "Maliss" Link Monsters for attacks. You can only activate 1 "Maliss in Underground" per turn.

attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
